titleStmt.title: SII 30.170: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 170. (A.R. No. 248 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the south wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 3[0]: 104[2] A.D.

summary.p: Built in at the end. Begins with the introduction tirumaṉṉivaḷara etc. The inscription is left incomplete after the name of the king and regnal year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrītirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum porc ceyappāvaiyum cirttaṉic celviyun taṉ perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyar Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarvaṉavelipaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻa matiṭkoḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇarkkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum
[in=tiraṉnāramum te] ṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭai keraḷan muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir velait tolperuṅkāval palpaḻattivum ceruleRead- ceruvilciṉavillirupattorukāllaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ melvaruñcāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempo
mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperumpukaḻoṭum piṭiyil Iraṭṭapāṭi Ēḻaraippukaḻ mannavare kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkarakoṭṭam mitur vaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamu keṭalarum kāmiṭai vaḷaiy nāmaṇaik koṇaimum veñcinavirar pañcapaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippaḻaṉa mācuṇi tecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti
ṉai viḷaiyamarkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭuniṟai kulataṉak kukaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurarcer nalkkocalai nāṭun tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭa puttiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṇai kirttittakkaṇalāṭamum ko
tecamun n=toṭukaṭal caṅkoṭaṭal mayipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟaliyāṉaiyum peṇṭiṟ paṇṭāramum nittiḷa neṭuṅkaṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalarttirttat teṟipuṉaikaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ palakalañceluttic caṅkirāma vicaiyottuṅka paṉmaṉākiya kaṭārattaraicaṉai vākaiyam porukaṭal kumpakkariyo
mum Ārttavaṉ Akaṉakar porttoḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamumoyttoḻiṟ puṉaimaṇipputavamuṅ kanamaṇikkatavamu niṟai tuṟainirp paṇṇaiyum vaṉmalaiyil yiṟṟeṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭal Akaḻ cūḻmāyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkā vanviṉai Ilaṅkā cokamuṅ kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉal māppappāḷamuṅ kāvalampuricai mevilimpaṅkamum viḷappaintūṟuṭai vaḷappantūṟuṅ kalaittak korpukaḻ talai
kkaṭun=tiṟalilāmuritecamun teṉakkavār poḻil māṉakkavāramun toḻukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramu māpporutaṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājendracoḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 jeyaṅkoṇṭaLeft incomplete
Digital edition of SII 30.170 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
